short_summary: Iran deal close, NATO cuts persist
rationale: The Iran deal moving closer is the most significant new development for US residents — it directly involves US foreign policy and has oil market implications; NATO asset cuts continue as a policy story.

top_events.title: Iran says deal to end fighting with US has 'never been closer'; no timeline yet
top_events.summary: Both US and Iranian sides signal a deal is imminent, which would end direct US-Iran military confrontation and ease oil prices. No signing yet but this is the closest the deal has come.

top_events.title: US to cut air and naval assets deployed for NATO operations in Europe
top_events.summary: Confirmed US military asset reductions in Europe reflect an active Trump administration policy shift, with ongoing domestic debate about America's global commitments and defense spending.

top_events.title: Musk becomes first trillionaire as SpaceX debuts on Nasdaq
top_events.summary: SpaceX's Nasdaq listing is a major US financial market event; Musk's wealth milestone and the IPO have broad market and political relevance given his ties to the Trump administration.
